requirement.title: Dependency-Aware Test Execution With Variable Extraction
requirement.goal: Cho phep nguoi dung chay test suite hoac mot subset test case tren execution environment cu the, co ho tro dependency chaining, variable extraction, auth runtime va environment fallback.
rationale: Test cases da co request/variable/dependency shape tu FE-05/FE-06 nhung chua co runtime engine.
ExecutionEnvironment da co baseUrl, headers, variables va authConfig nen co the tro thanh runtime profile.
Can ho tro workflow login -> lay token -> goi API duoc bao ve trong cung mot test run.

inScope: Start test run theo suite + environmentId? (nullable de fallback project default).
Load ordered test cases qua contract gateway va validate selectedTestCaseIds.
Resolve request placeholders tu environment variables va extracted variables.
Apply auth runtime tu ExecutionEnvironment truoc khi goi HTTP.
Extract variables tu response body/header/status va merge vao variable bag.
Skip dependent cases neu dependency fail.
outOfScope: Validation logic chi tiet ngoai viec goi IRuleBasedValidator.

acceptanceCriteria: AC-01: Co the start run bang environmentId cu the hoac project default environment neu request khong truyen environmentId.
AC-02: selectedTestCaseIds null/empty thi chay toan bo enabled test cases trong suite.
AC-03: selectedTestCaseIds co test case khong thuoc suite hoac bi disable thi tra 400.
AC-04: selectedTestCaseIds thieu transitive dependency thi tra 400 MISSING_DEPENDENCY_SELECTION.
AC-05: Placeholder {{var}} duoc resolve dung tren URL/path/query/header/body.
AC-06: Variable extract tu login response co the duoc dung cho request tiep theo trong cung run.
AC-07: Auth runtime khong de request-level negative auth case bi auth injection override.
implementationOrder: 1. Contract gateway doc execution graph tu TestGeneration.
2. StartTestRun command + run number allocation + environment load/fallback.
4. Variable resolver + HTTP executor + variable extractor.
5. Query APIs xem run history va run result.
